title: QC Assistant Manager/Senior QC Supervisor
description:
Responsibilities

  • Lead and conduct daily on-site inspections, ensuring compliance with quality standards, food safety regulations, and operational procedures across production
  • Supervise and conduct personal hygiene checks, product quality assessments, and sample retention protocols to ensure adherence to internal and external standards.
  • Develop, implement, and oversee testing and sampling schedules, ensuring all critical tests are conducted in accordance with product specifications and regulatory requirements.
  • Analyse test results and recommend corrective actions for any deviations or non-conformities.
  • Implementation and continuous improvement of Quality Management Systems (HACCP, BRC, ISO 22000) Food Safety Management System (FSMS) for relevant operations.
  • Oversee and updates of the Quality Management System and Standard of Procedure, ensuring alignment with industry best practices and regulatory changes.
  • Work closely with relevant departments to ensure operational adherence to standards and address any discrepancies or audit findings.
  • Ensure the accuracy, completeness, and proper retention of all quality assurance records, documents, and files as per regulatory and company policies.
  • Perform regular audits of quality documentation and lead the improvement of record-keeping practices.
  • Develop, review, and enhance Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) across all areas of operations to ensure best practices in quality control and food safety.
  • Conduct training, development and continuous improvement of food safety training materials, ensuring they are relevant, up-to-date, and aligned with company policies and industry standards.
  • Identify and mitigate quality risks, ensuring proactive measures are taken to prevent non-conformities and quality failures.
  • Communicate quality-related issues and improvements to stakeholders, ensuring alignment across all levels of the organization.

Requirements

  • Diploma/Degree in Food Science with at least 2 years of relevant experience
  • Good Knowledge of Quality Management Systems (HACCP, BRC, ISO 22000)
  • Good Communication, Organizational and Analytical Skills
  • Ability to work with multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment is required
  • 5 Days Work Week + 1 Saturday Per Month

*Salary package commensurate with experience

postedCompany.description:
It all started with a dream, a leap of faith, and a passion for Fish balls. Thong Siek Food Industry started in the 1970s as a family-run backyard operation. Back then, the entire family was involved in the production and distribution of a single product - Fish Ball. 


What started as a small operation in the backyard of the family home in 1976 has grown to become Singapore’s prefered brand in fish balls. In the beginning, the entire family was responsible for the fish ball production. Currently, DoDo food products are made possible by a workforce of more than 300 . To date, our base factory can produce more than 60 varieties of fish-based products, distributed all around the world. 


DoDo has grown to be a trusted brand worldwide. Produced by Thong Siek Global (TSG), DoDo is made by the first fish ball manufacturer in Singapore to attain the HACCP and Halal Certifications. The company also obtained the EU license for export to the EU market. In 2015, TSG attained the prestigious Gold Award from AVA for achieving Grade A in hygiene standard for 15 consecutive years. This is a FIRST in the fish ball manufacturing industry, an assurance to all DoDo lovers that all DoDo products keep a high standard. More than the awards and recognition, what we treasure most are the personal reviews, from home cooks who trust only DoDo, or parents who appreciate DoDo as a good snack for their kids. We keep things fresh and good with all of you in mind.


DoDo products remain very consistent to the standards kept when the small family business began. The DoDo fish ball, in particular, is considered a leading brand. It is known for its fresh taste and the goodness of its bite, which the perfect texture and bounciness that Singaporeans have come to love and enjoy. As a meal or as a snack, Singaporeans have chosen DoDo because of its healthy protein rich content and its low cholesterol. Whether in terms of goodness or benefits to the health, DoDo stands as the guiltless choice; Singaporeans say its "So Good, So Enjoy”.
postedCompany.name: TSG FOOD PTE. LTD.
